programme.desc: It's the Neighborhood of Make-Believe Arts Festival and all the neighbours are finding their own ways to express themselves. Mister Rogers encourages his "television friends" to appreciate the wide va (S4 E05)

programme.title: Love Sarah
programme.desc: Three generations of women, led by Mimi will need to overcome grief, doubts and differences to honour the memory of their beloved Sarah, while embarking on a journey to establish a new bakery in Notting Hill, a place filled with love, hope and colourful pastries from all over the world.

programme.title: Welcome to the Dollhouse
programme.desc: Junior high student Dawn “Wiener-dog” Wiener is perpetually teased by her classmates and tormented by the school bully, Brandon. All she wants is to be popular and that would certainly help her emerging crush on the lead of her brother's garage band.

programme.title: Fear Inc.
programme.desc: A horror junkie and his friends sign up with a company that brings their customer's greatest fears to life.

programme.title: Leading Ladies
programme.desc: Leading Ladies reflects how guilt affects us in different ways based on our perspective or memories. A dinner is the excuse to discover that we always keep a secret. Some lies have been saved for years, other hidden for months, many of them will come to light during this special meeting.

programme.title: Renegade: Family Ties
programme.desc: Reno Raines, a tough, young street cop, is framed for a murder he didn't commit. Fleeing from the only system of justice he knows, Raines takes to the streets as a modern-day bounty hunter.

programme.title: Dead Heat
programme.desc: In this offbeat comedy thriller, Roger Mortis is a good cop who will do anything to nail the bad guys, even if he's got to die for it.

programme.title: Tomboy
programme.desc: Frank Kitchen is an assassin at the top of his game. When he's double-crossed, by a group of ruthless gangsters, he falls into the hands of a rogue surgeon known only as The Doctor, who transforms him into a woman against his will.

programme.title: Legendary
programme.desc: A team travels to China to capture a primeval creature that is not supposed to exist.

programme.title: We Die Young
programme.desc: Sudden Death meets Sicario in this gritty thriller starring action legend Jean Claud Van Damme. When a ruthless drug lord recruits a 10-year-old boy, his older brother is desperate to keep him safe and flees for their lives.

programme.title: Waiting for You
programme.desc: Paul (Morgan) investigates his late father's increasingly disturbing past and becomes suspicious of the mysterious, melancholic, and possibly dangerous Madeleine (Ardant).

programme.title: Bravetown
programme.desc: Josh, a talented DJ, comes to a small town, where he finds love, and a friend. A place he never would have thought he'd belong.

programme.title: The Evil Within
programme.desc: A lonely, mentally handicapped boy befriends his reflection in an antique mirror. This demonic creature orders him to go on a murderous rampage to kill the people he loves most.

programme.title: Big Ass Spider
programme.desc: A giant alien spider escapes from a military lab and rampages the city of Los Angeles. When a massive military strike fails, it is up to a team of scientists and one clever exterminator to kill the creature before the city is destroyed.

programme.title: Love In Aruba
programme.desc: A lonely teacher (Amber) is hired by Connor, the single father of a struggling student. She is to tutor his daughter Macey (age 10) over a summer while they travel for his work. As Amber helps Macey, she sees glimpses of what's missing in the family's life. Their grand destinations are filled with rich items and potential rewarding business deals, but it's missing heart. Amber's influence fills the void and brings Macey and Connor together. With it, Amber starts to fall in love with Connor, but can he see her as anything beyond the hired help?

programme.title: The Baby Proposal
programme.desc: Layla Bennett and Derek Dray are the hosts of Wake Up, Chicago and for the folks at home, their chemistry is undeniable. Derek is incredibly protective about the format of Wakeup, Chicago while Layla is always looking to shake things up. One morning they discover an adorable baby named Poppy left in a basket in Laylas dressing room. The mother passed away and the caretaker is unable to care for Poppy and is convinced that Layla and Derek will make perfect parents.

programme.title: It's a Fixer Upper
programme.desc: When The Dovers find they're in financial jeopardy, the only answer is to sell the house Anne's parent's left her. But when no one wants to buy it, they decide the only way to get rid of the house is to fix it up.

programme.title: Lights, Camera, Romance
programme.desc: Actress Emma Hutton is determined to help find her friend Hope a perfect match but in doing so, she accidentally tramples on several hearts. When Emma realizes she herself has always loved her good friend Gray, Emma learns love works best when she doesn't meddle with it. A charming romance inspired by Jane Austen's "Emma."

programme.title: Love in Focus
programme.desc: When the hit show actress Jenna Wilde stars in suddenly gets cancelled, the press start circling. To escape the chaos Jenna retreats to a snowy cabin in the mountains. Unexpectedly, she must share this peaceful place with a rude and rugged nature photographer Chris Dixon. Their coolness towards each other starts to thaw when Chris helps Jenna audition for other shows.

programme.title: Gun Duel in Durango
programme.desc: Ex-outlaw Will Sabre wants an honest life under the alias Dan Tomlinson but his old gang, under new leader Dunsten, wants him back for a new string of armed robberies.

programme.title: Crazy Westerners
programme.desc: Inspired by the life of Hank Garland, CRAZY is the story of a legendary guitar player who emerged from Nashville in the 1950's.

programme.title: Cry Blood Apache
programme.desc: Gang of sadistic cowboys let nothing stand in their way in their search for gold.

programme.title: Canadian Pacific
programme.desc: A surveyor for the Canadian Pacific Railroad must fight fur trappers who oppose the building of the railroad by stirring up Indian rebellion.

programme.title: The Man from Utah
programme.desc: In a horse-riding rodeo contest bad guys want John Weston to lose. When he doesn't go along they add some insurance: a poisoned needle just under his saddle.

programme.title: 12 Days of Giving
programme.desc: When Baxter decides to become a Secret Santa to the people in his hometown and the joy of giving at Christmas spreads across town. Along the way, he forms a close friendship with Pamela and her son Westin. But there's one problem, he's already engaged!

programme.title: Accidentally In Love
programme.desc: Edie finds true love in London just days before she is to return to the US. They are separated, but as fate would have it, they reunite 6 years later in the US.

programme.title: Royal Runaways
programme.desc: A prince doesn't want to become King after his father dies, so he hides at a winery as a handyman to follow his own path.

programme.title: Fixing Up Christmas
programme.desc: Known as a “fixer” for difficult clients, a talented party planner must help a young CEO plan the Christmas party of the year to dazzle the mayor and save his company. Wil the "fixer" fix something more than just the company?

programme.title: Under the Mistletoe
programme.desc: Starring Jaime Ray Newman, Michael Shanks, and Conan Graham. At Christmas, the tables turn on a selfless single mom when a local radio station takes over her love life after an innocent call from her 8-year-old son.

programme.title: Irresistible
programme.desc: Sophie Hartley is convinced she is the subject of a stalker's attention and that Mara, one of her husband's pretty co-workers, is trying to rob her of her children, her spouse and her very identity. As no-one believes her Sophie sets out to prove her sanity.

programme.title: 24 Hours to Live or Die
programme.desc: Two ambitious detectives stakeout a potential drug deal. As they investigate a suspected gang related murder with racial connotations their shared history rising through the ranks of the police force is called into question. AKA Dragonflies Only Live for 24 Hours.

programme.title: George And The Dragon
programme.desc: A knight (James Purefoy, "Rome") returning from the Crusades takes on a dragon after the disappearance of the kindly Princess Lunna (Piper Perabo, "Coyote Ugly"). With Patrick Swayze.

programme.title: Down a Dark Hall
programme.desc: Based on Lois Duncan's young adult thriller, story follows Kit Gordy, a new student at Blackwood Boarding School, who must unlock the mysteries of the school's tragic past.

programme.title: Stonehearst Asylum
programme.desc: An Oxford grad (Jim Sturgess, 'Across the Universe') accepts a job at a mental asylum and soon discovers that its 'revolutionary' new treatments are inhumane and horrific. Also starring Kate Beckinsale and Brendan Gleeson.

programme.title: Ali
programme.desc: A biography of sports legend Muhammad Ali, focusing on his triumphs and controversies between 1964 and 1974.

programme.title: Exceptional Beings
programme.desc: Two supernatural beings question their divine status when they meet an ordinary woman with a disturbing essence: a human being who does not correspond to what their millennia of knowledge of humanity has taught them.

programme.title: Devil's Gate (Abduction)
programme.desc: Set in the small town of Devil's Gate, North Dakota, the film examines the disappearance of a local woman and her young son. Schull plays an FBI agent who helps the local sheriff search for answers. Partnering with a deputy, they track down the missing woman's husband and find that nothing is as it seems.

programme.title: Eternity
programme.desc: Detective Richard Manning (played by Elliot Travers) is transported into a virtual-reality computer game and tasked with solving a seemingly implausible murder. The more Richard investigates, the more complex the case seems to become. He soon realizes his own future and survival depend on him solving everything - and quickly.

programme.title: Sharknado
programme.desc: When a freak tornado swamps Los Angeles, thousands of man-eating sharks are sucked into the swirling vortex, terrorizing the waterlogged populace and flooding the city with shark-infested seawater. Surfer and bar-owner Fin (Ian Ziering, Beverley Hills, 90210) sets out with his friends Baz (Jaason Simmons, Baywatch) and Nova to rescue his estranged wife April and teenage daughter Claudia from the sharks raining down from the skies. With nature's deadliest killer ruling sea, land, and air, they soon realise that the only way to survive the deadly shark-infested maelstrom is to tackle it head on. Their plan? Commandeer a helicopter and fly close enough to launch bombs directly into the tornado!

programme.title: Settlers
programme.desc: Following ecological disaster, a family from Earth do what they must to survive on a desolate Mars homestead. But when strangers appear in the surrounding hills and attempt to run them off, nine-year-old Remmy (Brooklynn Prince) catches a glimpse of the desperate reality her parents, Reza (Jonny Lee Miller) and Ilsa (Sofia Boutella), have tried so hard to keep from her.

programme.title: Ivy & Mistletoe
programme.desc: A young woman is determined to get home for Christmas, but gets stranded in a small town during a snow storm. Little does she know that she is exactly where she is supposed to be.

programme.title: Christmas on the Bayou
programme.desc: A divorced workaholic executive goes back to her home town to spend Christmas with her son and mother. Through a rekindled romance and a small miracle, she discovers where her heart truly belongs.

programme.title: The Bad Son
programme.desc: An elusive serial killer is killing innocent women in Seattle. The police and FBI are on the killer's trail but were never prepared to face a bizarre twist in the case.

programme.title: Discreet
programme.desc: Monique, a high-class escort, has always given her clients what they wanted, while clean-cut Thomas, has always been what everyone has expected.

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori is cooking for girls night and must figure out how to please both of her friends!

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori surprises her family with a meal that transports them to Spain.

programme.title: Mr. Morgan's Last Love
programme.desc: From the day Pauline (Clemence Poésy) lends him a helping hand on the bus, the stubborn and weary Matthew Morgan (Sir Michael Caine) stumbles back to happiness.

programme.title: W.E
programme.desc: The affair between King Edward VIII and American divorcée Wallis Simpson and a contemporary romance between a married woman and a Russian security guard.

programme.title: Blind
programme.desc: Bestselling novelist, Bill Oakland loses his wife and his sight in a vicious car crash. Five years later Socialite Suzanne Dutchman is forced to read to Bill in an intimate room three times a week as a plea bargain for being associated with her husband's insider trading.

programme.title: After the Reality
programme.desc: The life of a contestant (Matthew Morrison) on a Bachelorette style reality show is thrown into turmoil when the sudden death of his father forces him to quit the series prematurely and reconnect with his estranged sister at the family cabin.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Two kids with special abilities must find a girl in Hong Kong before a shadowy government organization does.

programme.title: Tracers
programme.desc: Taylor Lautner stars in a pulse-pounding action heist film set in the world of parkour.

programme.title: Deepwater Horizon
programme.desc: Mark Wahlberg leads an all-star cast in the thrilling story of real-life heroes on a burning oil rig.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Two kids with special abilities must find a girl in Hong Kong before a shadowy government organization does.

programme.title: Merry Good Enough
programme.desc: Lucy Raulie has always had a complicated relationship with her family, but when her mother disappears on Christmas Eve, the dysfunctional family hit a new all-time low. Aided by her reluctant siblings in an attempt to bring the family back together, the Raulie kids may get more than they bargained for when their eccentric father, George, also shows up to "help" in the search for their wayward mom. A razor-sharp and delightfully heartwarming festive comedy, packed with classic Christmas songs and a stand-out ensemble cast, including Joel Murray (Mad Men), Sawyer Spielberg (Masters of the Air), Susan Gallagher (Cobra Kai), Neil Casey (Ghostbusters, Avenue 5), Comfort Clinton (Billions, FBI), Sophie von Haselberg (Give Me Pity, Pose) and Raye Spielberg.

programme.title: The Nights Before Christmas
programme.desc: In this Christmas set horror, a pair of crazed killers have written a very special 'naughty' list of targets. You better watch out, as now they've checked it twice, all sorts of festive hell is about to break loose! When a series of murders in the run up to Christmas are found to be linked, FBI Special Agent Natalie Parker is tasked with tracking a pair of psychotic serial killers. But she soon discovers the couple are not only crazy, having met in and escaped from an asylum for the criminally insane, but have based their personas on Santa and Mrs Claus. As Christmas approaches, they slaughter their way through their special naughty list, playing a cat and mouse game with the FBI and leaving a trail of gruesome bloody bodies in their wake.

programme.title: Last Days in the Desert
programme.desc: As Jesus begins his journey out of the wilderness following forty days of fasting and praying, he struggles with the Devil over the fate of a family in crisis. This powerful drama depicting an imagined chapter from Jesus' life stars Golden Globe winner Ewan McGregor (Trainspotting, Star Wars franchise), Academy Award nominee Ciarn Hinds (Belfast, Game of Thrones), and Tye Sheridan (Mud, X-Men franchise).

programme.title: Rare Exports: A Christmas Tale
programme.desc: Do you believe in Santa Claus? On the eve of Christmas a young boy sets out to discover the truth behind several strange goings on in his small isolated village. Why have all the reindeer been slaughtered? Who took all the hairdryers and radiators? And where have all the children gone? Seal the chimney. Lock the doors. Hide your children. This year the real Santa Claus is coming to town.

programme.title: A Professor's Vengeance
programme.desc: Nicole returns to graduate school, but someone on campus has his eye on her.

programme.title: Teens Gone Wild
programme.desc: Following a difficult breakup in a string of failed relationships.

programme.title: Teens Gone Wild
programme.desc: Following a difficult breakup in a string of failed relationships.

programme.title: The College Admissions Scandal
programme.desc: Two wealthy mothers obsess over getting their teens into top colleges.

programme.title: My Professor's Guide to Murder
programme.desc: A murder-mystery writer is invited to be a lecturer at a university.

programme.title: A Professor's Vengeance
programme.desc: Nicole returns to graduate school, but someone on campus has his eye on her.

programme.title: Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: A tense and high octane thriller from the producer of Nightcrawler. Cal (Jai Courtney: Suicide Squad) is a by-the-book police officer. When his reckless half-brother, Oyster (Nat Wolff: The Fault in our Stars), is given an unfair prison sentence, Cal driven by his loyalty to family and fierce code of honour fights for Oyster in this gripping tale of brotherhood and sacrifice.

programme.title: The Escorts
programme.desc: This hilarious comedy tells the tale of an insecure first-time dad (Jason Biggs: American Pie) who unwittingly accepts a job chauffeuring three call girls (Ashley Tisdale: High School Musical, Janet Montgomery: This is Us and Bria L. Murphy: The Perfect Match) that lead to one long and crazy night full of rockin women. A sordid, side-splitting trip sure to get pulses racing!

programme.title: The Furies
programme.desc: FrightFest Presents. The Furies is Halloween meets The Hunger Games in this gripping & fast paced female-driven survival thriller. A young woman faces her darkest fears with seven other unwilling participants in a deadly game. A game that can only have one winner.

programme.title: Infernal
programme.desc: In the vein of The Omen and Insidious, this dark horror is set to petrify! Newlyweds Nathan and Sophia are looking ahead to their bright future, but are unaware of the darkness that is about to entail. When their first child Imogene begins exhibiting strange and demonic behaviour, their future is left uncertain as they desperately search for answers to free their daughter. Deeply disturbing!

programme.title: Northpole 2: Open For Christmas
programme.desc: Santa is worried about Mackenzie's plans for the magical hotel she inherited from her aunt. So, he sends his trusted elf on a mission to get her to believe in the magic of Christmas again. (2015)

programme.title: Another Christmas Kiss
programme.desc: Jenna shares a passionate and unforgettable kiss under the mistletoe with a handsome stranger. But will the man's name and reputation ultimately deter her from following her heart? (2014)

programme.title: A Golden Christmas
programme.desc: Jessica returns to her parent's home for Christmas to discover the house she grew up in has been sold to a stranger, so she looks to buy it back (2009)

programme.title: Hearts Of Christmas
programme.desc: The planning of a popular colleague's retirement party causes friction between Jenny and Matt.

programme.title: Christmas Manger
programme.desc: A modern Christmas fable about a rough-around-the-edges rancher who is reunited with his daughter.

programme.title: Luckless In Love
programme.desc: Blogger Winnie and sports agent Holden are both dating with the intention to further their career. As their feelings grow, they discover the only people they are lying to are themselves. (2022)

programme.title: Snapshot Of Love
programme.desc: Adrian is a Hollywood paparazzi assigned to get photos of a very elusive star, Parker Bennett. Little does she know, she'll get her chance when they both end up at the same BnB in the mountains of NC.

programme.title: Love In Translation
programme.desc: Sparks begin to fly between a Linguistics Ph.D. student and her French student. Starring Michelle Argyris (2021)

programme.title: Listen Out for Love
programme.desc: Peyton is an ambitious podcast producer under pressure to deliver a hit show. Will a show centred around finding her one true love prove to be a success? Starring Stephanie Bennett. (2021)

programme.title: Love Upstream
programme.desc: An author heads into the wilderness to write her new book. Meanwhile a romance begins to blossom between her and her guide. Starring Kimberly-Sue Murray (2021)

programme.title: THAT HAMILTON WOMAN
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier and Vivien Leigh star as Lord Nelson and Lady Hamilton.

programme.title: Sparrows Can't Sing
programme.desc: Sparrows Can't Sing is Joan Littlewood's bawdy, boisterous and touching picture of Cockney life, made on the spot by people whose roots are in the East End of London.

programme.title: PERSONAL AFFAIR
programme.desc: When a teenaged student disappears, her teacher is suspected of killing her.

programme.title: A CUCKOO IN THE NEST
programme.desc: Leaving to join his wife at a party in the country, Peter misses his train through chatting to an old friend, Marguerite. The two are forced to stop at an inn which only has one room left. But unknown to Peter, he is being pursued by his in-laws!

programme.title: BACHELOR OF HEARTS
programme.desc: A German exchange student at Cambridge University unwittingly becomes the victim of a practical joke performed by the Dodo circle - a group of students that must undertake one impossible feat a term.

programme.title: Life or Something Like It
programme.desc: The perfect world of a beautiful Seattle television reporter is shattered by the prediction of her death in seven days.

programme.title: Rampart
programme.desc: Set in 1999 Los Angeles, veteran police officer Dave Brown, the last of the renegade cops, works to take care of his family, and struggles for his own survival.

programme.title: Talladega Nights: The Ballad of Ricky Bobby
programme.desc: NASCAR stock car racing sensation Ricky Bobby is a national hero because of his "win at all costs" approach. He and his loyal racing partner, childhood friend Cal Naughton Jr., are a fearless duo -- "Thunder" and "Lightning".

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt
programme.desc: After being involved in a fatal hit and run incident Assistant DA Mitch Brody must prosecute an innocent man. Due to some inconclusive evidence Brody manages to throw the case, however he quickly realizes the man he thought to be innocent could just be the most dangerous man he has ever met.

programme.title: The Net
programme.desc: With a story ripped from today's headlines, THE NET is a compelling, high-tech drama about a computer systems analyst (Sandra Bullock) who becomes caught in a web of intrigue and conspiracy when she accidentally taps into a classified program.

programme.title: Wind Chill
programme.desc: Two college students share a ride home for the holidays. When they break down on a deserted stretch of road, they're preyed upon by the ghosts of people who have died there.

programme.title: The Girl With The Dragon Tattoo
programme.desc: Journalist Mikael Blomkvist is aided in his search for a woman who has been missing for forty years by Lisbeth Salander, a young computer hacker.

programme.title: The Girl With The Dragon Tattoo
programme.desc: Journalist Mikael Blomkvist is aided in his search for a woman who has been missing for forty years by Lisbeth Salander, a young computer hacker.

programme.title: Year One
programme.desc: When a couple of lazy hunter-gatherers (Black and Cera) are banished from their primitive village, they set off on an epic journey through the ancient world.

programme.title: Blue Streak
programme.desc: A convicted thief poses as a cop in order to retrieve a stolen diamond.

programme.title: Almost Famous
programme.desc: A 15-year-old music fan and fledgling journalist goes on the road with a popular rock band in the anything-goes 1970's.

programme.title: Seems Like Old Times
programme.desc: In Neil Simon's SEEMS LIKE OLD TIMES, Chevy Chase is forced to abet some bank robbers, and soon the cops are after him. His ex-wife, Goldie Hawn, is a liberal lawyer married to the local district attorney. When Chase arrives at their home seeking shelter, she takes him in and their passions are rekindled.

programme.title: Just a Gigolo
programme.desc: Paul von Przygodski (David Bowie), a young Prussian gentleman, arrives in the trenches in time to be caught in the final explosion of the Great War. After recuperating in a military hospital, where he is mistaken for a French hero, he returns to Berlin.

programme.title: Eden
programme.desc: Spanning two decades across Paris, New York and Chicago, Eden is an epic story of euphoria, melancholy and passion.

programme.title: The Mother
programme.desc: When May's husband dies on a family visit to London, she recedes into the background of her busy children's lives. Until, that is, she falls for Darren, a man half her age who is renovating her son's house and sleeping with her daughter.

programme.title: Guardians of the Tomb
programme.desc: An innocent discovery of a well-preserved mummified Emperor from 200 B.C. China unearths a two thousand-year-old nightmare, a secret that should have remained buried.

programme.title: Son of a Gun
programme.desc: JR busts out of prison with Brendan Lynch, Australia's most notorious criminal, and joins Lynch's gang for a gold heist that soon pits the two men against one another.

programme.title: Essex Vendetta
programme.desc: Spencer Atkins is an ordinary man about to be drawn into the dangerous world of organized crime. To protect his family's future Spencer will travel from the streets of Essex to Malta on a mission that involves murder, treachery, and betrayal.

programme.title: The Good, the Bad, the Weird
programme.desc: Set in the 1930's Manchurian desert where lawlessness rules, three Korean men fatefully meet each other on a train. Do-Won (Jung Woo-sung - The Warrior) is a bounty hunter who tracks down dangerous criminals.

programme.desc: Raja Beta is an Indian television drama series that revolves around the life of Vedant Tripathi, an ideal and dutiful son. Vedant is adopted by the Tripathi family and grows up to become a successful gynecologist. programme.title: Mehek
programme.desc: Zindagi Ki Mehek is an Indian television drama series that aired from 2016 to 2018. The story revolves around Mehek Sharma, a talented cook from a middle-class family, and Shaurya Khanna, a wealthy and arrogant restaurateur. Their paths cross when Mehek participates in a cooking competition that Shaurya is judging. Despite their contrasting personalities and initial conflicts, they fall in love and face numerous challenges together, including family opposition and personal vendettas. The show blends themes of love, family, and ambition with a strong emphasis on culinary arts.

programme.title: The Leaden Age
programme.desc: In the mid-fifties Franco's foreign policy successes opened up new perspectives for Spain. After years of stagnation the country was now moving forwards. Thus, Franco's rule was legitimized. Resistance fell silent. The dictator sat firmly in the saddle. But along with the new friends, new influences also entered the country.

programme.title: The Rise to Power
programme.desc: At the end of a bloody civil war, Francisco Franco seized power and ruled Spain with an iron hand for nearly four decades. Under his leadership the conservative, monarchist armed forces staged a coup against Spain's republican government which had been democratically elected.

programme.title: The New Regime
programme.desc: The Franco myth stands for a cruel regime: for the darkest chapter in Spanish history. Franco gave himself the title of Caudillo de España - Supreme Leader of Spain. He created his own rituals of power: the war hero, the family man, and the mass murderer. Franco was a man of many faces.

programme.title: Zero Hour
programme.desc: At the end of the Second World War the cards in global politics were reshuffled. The Allies now made a clear distinction between the friends and foes of democracy. The situation became critical for Franco, because in Spain many suffered from his reign of terror. For that reason, there were many who wanted to topple him.

programme.title: The Leaden Age
programme.desc: In the mid-fifties Franco's foreign policy successes opened up new perspectives for Spain. After years of stagnation the country was now moving forwards. Thus, Franco's rule was legitimized. Resistance fell silent. The dictator sat firmly in the saddle. But along with the new friends, new influences also entered the country.

programme.title: Osama Bin Laden
programme.desc: Just after midnight on May 2, 2011, United States Special Forces raided the compound in Abbottabad, Pakistan, where Osama Bin laden had been hiding for years. “America's public enemy number one” was killed during the operation. The Navy SEALs thoroughly searched his house, recovering everything that could provide information about Bin Laden and his terrorist network Al-Qaeda: His documents and private correspondence, as well as every electronic data carrier.

programme.desc: Mick Fleetwood, John McVie, Lindsey Buckingham, and Stevie Nicks conclude their energetic concert, singing some of the band's greatest hits as part of their 2004 'Say You Will' tour.

programme.title: Suzi Q
programme.desc: Follows the story of the iconic history-making, rock singer-songwriter Suzi Q, who was instrumental in redefining the role of women in rock music, when she broke onto the scene in 1973.

programme.title: The Eagles: Desperado
programme.desc: Bandmates and music industry insiders paint a colourful picture of American rockers The Eagles.

programme.title: The Upside Down Tree
programme.desc: The African Baobab is one of the largest living things in the world, an icon of the African landscape, instantly recognisable, mysterious and intriguing. It is the world's biggest flowering plant and the largest succulent plant on earth. The Baobab is associated with myths and legends. This one hour film is a fascinating history and overview of the remarkable Baobab.

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Chile: Episode 1
programme.desc: This is the story of an awe-inspiring land of extremes. From the cold and fearsome waters of Tierra Del Fuego and the Antarctic Peninsula to the frozen Patagonian steppe, we follow the animals living on the very edge of existence, having to survive is some of the most extreme environments on earth. King Penguins court on the windswept coast leopard seals hunt amongst the ice floes and young pumas take their first steps toward independence is this South American final Frontier.

programme.title: Into The Dragon's Lair
programme.desc: Didier Noirot, a diver with Jacques Cousteau on over 5000 dives, along with South African photographer Roger Horrocks, notorious for his daring shark photography, team up to dive with the giant Nile crocodile - the last predator on earth which views humans as prey. Before meeting Roger, Didier battles overwhelming fear, poor visibility and diving partners too terrified to back them up.

programme.title: Biomimicry
programme.desc: The most dangerous types of snake venom are used successfully in the medical field. We have discovered natural blood thinners in the saliva of bats and anesthetic properties in that of mosquitos.

programme.title: Biomimicry
programme.desc: The lines and shapes of the natural world seem blurry and chaotic, as though they were all the result of a huge mess. But only at first glance! Are there no straight lines in nature? What about right angles? Don't these exist?

programme.title: Oceans Of Contrast
programme.desc: Southern Africa has a dramatic landscape. Two contrasting currents, the cold Benguela on the west and south, and the warm Agulhas on the east, bathe the shores. These two contrasting oceans create one of the most diverse marine environments on Earth with abundance in life. The two marine currents not only rule the marine world but they are giant forces that shape the landscape through the climate.

programme.title: The Upside Down Tree
programme.desc: The African Baobab is one of the largest living things in the world, an icon of the African landscape, instantly recognisable, mysterious and intriguing. It is the world's biggest flowering plant and the largest succulent plant on earth. The Baobab is associated with myths and legends. This one hour film is a fascinating history and overview of the remarkable Baobab.

programme.title: Over the Islands of Africa
programme.desc: Photographer Matthias Ziegler is an Africa specialist. He has visited nearly every country on the continent on assignments for international agencies. Zanzibar, however, is new territory for him. He's come to the former slave island for a photo book – and this time he's not alone. To see the Tanzanian archipelago from the air, he has enlisted the services of ultralight pilot Richard Meredith-Hardy of England to fly him around in his FIB, or flying inflatable boat. Perfect conditions for an adventurous journey: as a world champion ultralight pilot, Richard and his FIB can take off and land practically anywhere – in theory. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Over the Islands of Africa
programme.desc: Renaud Van Der Meeren is a photographer and paramotor pilot. With his motorised parachute he goes on expeditions to the remotest corners on earth to photograph people and landscapes from the air. Renaud wanted to be a jet pilot, studied music at the Sorbonne, became a ski instructor, model and photographer's assistant before he found happiness in his current vocation. He especially likes to do his job in Mauritius – nowhere else does he find so many motifs as on the "sweetest pearl in the Indian Ocean". This time he's working on a photo book about Mauritius – by land, by water and in the air. (S1 E02)

programme.title: Over the Islands of Africa
programme.desc: Spirits, Kings, Lemurs – Madagascar treats Ami to a multitude of new impressions and spectacular pictures. Director Christian Schidlowski and his team accompanied her on her trip. (S1 E03)

programme.title: Over the Islands of Africa
programme.desc: Along with photographer Rui Camilo, we travel to the West African island nation of Sao Tomé and Príncipe - in search of images that will capture the soul of this small and beautiful country. (S1 E04)

programme.title: The Secret of Migrating Birds
programme.desc: Each year in spring, Israel witnesses a unique spectacle. Many millions of migrating birds cross the land bridge between Africa, Asia and Europe.Their first major roosting place after an exhausting nonstop flight over the African deserts is in southern Israel – a vital stopover. Here they replenish their energy reserves. The flocks of migrating birds are pursued by flocks of ornithologists. Hundreds of birders flood into the port city of Eilat on the Red Sea to take part in the Migration Festival. For a week, Israel's southernmost coastal resort is home to international scientists and amateur birders.

programme.title: Unnatural Selection
programme.desc: The wings of cliff swallows in Nebraska are getting shorter – while female turtles in Chesapeake Bay are getting larger. On the Galapagos Islands, two species of finches are developing back into one. Increasing numbers of peregrine falcons are living in urban areas – and have adapted their behaviour: thanks to the city lights, they have learned to hunt at night.

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Amazon River Islands: The Floating Forest

programme.title: Speed Kills

programme.title: Showcase
programme.desc: We follow a lioness in search of a kill, then we're off to Sodwana to drift along with a gigantic whale shark.

programme.title: Modern Migrations
programme.desc: Classified as critically endangered, these animals are known for their unpredictable and aggressive behaviour when approached or caught unaware. Join the capture team in an adventurous capture exercise at the Hluhluwe-Imfolozi Park.

programme.title: City Zoo

programme.title: City Zoo
programme.desc: In this episode we follow the zoo crew as they work with the antelope. The team dart and capture Lechwe, but things start going wrong when one of the animals reacts badly to the tranquilizer.

programme.title: City Zoo
programme.desc: In this episode we follow the zoo crew as they enrich the lives of their residents by stimulating their senses. A giraffe is given a gourmet meal. whilst a komodo dragon is hot on the trail of a deer scent inside its enclosure.

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: The vet students meet for the first time and travel 7 hours to the remote clinic. The resident vet, Dr. Greg, helps them muddle through the first real cases of their young careers.

programme.title: Shamwari
programme.desc: The Born Free lions are about to be taught a very important lesson that could save their lives. It's all hands-on deck as the team struggle to push a rhino into a travelling crate and world's deadliest cargo takes to the skies.

programme.title: Shamwari
programme.desc: Capturing a large bull elephant almost ends in disaster when it falls in an awkward position and stops breathing. We welcome some very rare and special new arrivals. White lion cubs have just been born at Shamwari's sister reserve Sanbona.

programme.title: Shamwari
programme.desc: Johan has a rather sensitive procedure to perform. He needs to operate on a rhino's penis. The wild dogs have escaped from Shamwari and the team must now battle to get them back before they start killing livestock on the neighbouring farms.

programme.title: Shamwari
programme.desc: A lion cub with a broken leg checks in to the animal hospital. A new bunch of ranger trainees arrives at Shamwari and we start putting them through their paces. They need to get down and dirty if they are to pass their first exam.

programme.title: The Rhino Orphanage
programme.desc: Too small to mix with others, Pemba needs a rhino friend his age, enter orphaned 34 day old, Dwayne. Under-staffed and over-worked, Karen is eager to get the two little guys living together, it should be easy - but little rhinos don't always comply.

programme.title: The Rhino Orphanage
programme.desc: Little Nyani was born premature and was sent to the rhino orphanage. Raising a premature calf is a first for the orphanage. One day the little one is running around, the next she's in Onderstepoort's Veterinary Hospital, fighting for her life.
